summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tilt AI iteration 5 - Guide mode feature. All 24 backend tests passed (100%) including 6 new tests for POST /api/guide-step endpoint. Frontend landing page renders correctly. All new Guide mode data-testid attributes verified in source code.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 OK with status and timestamp
POST /api/assist accepts basic message and returns {response, mode: 'chat'}
POST /api/assist uses screen_context in its response
POST /api/assist supports conversation continuation with previous messages
POST /api/assist works with all parameters
POST /api/assist returns 422 for missing message
POST /api/analyze-screen accepts base64 JPEG image and returns context/activity
POST /api/analyze-screen handles data URI prefix correctly
POST /api/analyze-screen returns 422 for missing image_base64
POST /api/generate-decisions works with basic input
POST /api/generate-decisions returns safe/smart/bold/reasoning JSON structure
POST /api/generate-decisions works with screen context
POST /api/generate-decisions works with user_preference and tone_traits
POST /api/generate-decisions works with all parameters combined
POST /api/generate-decisions returns 422 for missing input_text
POST /api/guide-step accepts {image_base64, task, completed_steps, step_number} and returns guidance
POST /api/guide-step returns region with x, y coordinates (0-1 range) and label
POST /api/guide-step advances through steps correctly with completed_steps
POST /api/guide-step returns is_complete boolean flag
POST /api/guide-step handles data URI prefix correctly
POST /api/guide-step returns 422 for missing required fields
Full integration flow: analyze screen -> generate decisions
Landing page renders with 'Decide better, together.' headline
Start Decision Layer button present and clickable
All data-testid attributes present for Guide mode (mode-guide-btn, guide-view, guide-stop-btn, guide-annotated-image, guide-instruction, guide-complete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly including new /api/guide-step endpoint for step-by-step screen guidance. The guide-step endpoint returns region coordinates in 0-1 normalized range. Screen sharing and Guide mode auto-capture cannot be fully automated due to browser permissions requirement. Document Picture-in-Picture API requires Chrome 116+ and user gesture. Use localhost:8001 for backend testing to avoid proxy 403 errors for large payloads.

guide_step_endpoint.description: New POST /api/guide-step endpoint for step-by-step screen guidance with Claude vision

response_format.instruction: string - Clear instruction for next action

guide_mode_ui.description: FloatingPalette now has 3 modes: Assist, Guide, Decide
features: Guide mode with annotated screenshots showing beacon at target element
Auto-capture every 6 seconds to check progress
is_complete flag when task is finished
guide_mode_ui.status: VERIFIED via source code review - cannot automate screen share
